name: claude-skills
description: Personal Claude Code skills marketplace for samjmc.

plugins.name: review-loop
plugins.description: Iterative code review skill that runs deep review passes (security, logic bugs, implementation gaps, second-order effects, loose ends, AI-slop / code bloat), fixes findings in severity order, self-reviews the fixes for regressions and bloat, and repeats until the codebase is clean and minimal.

plugins.name: deploy-frontend
plugins.description: Deploy the RWA Frontend and Chatbot API to Azure Container Apps via GitHub CI/CD. Push to develop deploys staging, merge develop -> main deploys production. Manual Docker is emergency fallback only. Project-specific: assumes ACR rwatableauportalacr and resource group rg_rwatableauportal-prod.
